x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The CMDB Health workspace is the prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores. Zero health_score records means CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 rely on proxy metrics only.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Navigate to All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard to configure and activate the workspace. Trigger the health jobs to begin populating cmdb_health_score records. The workspace is prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[The CMDB Health workspace is the prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores. Zero health_score records means CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 rely on proxy metrics only.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CMDB Health Workspace Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var scores = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = scores + " cmdb_health_scorecard records (0 = health jobs have never run successfully)";
    if (scores > 0) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: scores + " CMDB health scorecard records found. CMDB Health Workspace is configured and health jobs have run — official completeness and correctness scores are available." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No CMDB health scorecard records found. CMDB Health Workspace has never run successfully — official health scores are unavailable. Proxy metrics are being used instead." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000392</number><order>200</order><remediation_guidance>Navigate to All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard to configure and activate the workspace. Trigger the health jobs to begin populating cmdb_health_score records. The workspace is prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CMDB Health Workspace Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
